name: Agronomy RAG Chatbot
description: An agriculture-focused AI chatbot that uses Retrieval-Augmented Generation to deliver context-aware answers from a domain-specific agronomy knowledge base.
detailedDescription: AURA is a domain-specific agronomy chatbot designed to assist users with agriculture-related queries through a Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline. The system uses structured JSON knowledge files, semantic search, and ChromaDB as a persistent vector database to retrieve relevant agricultural context before generating responses. Its modular Python-based architecture includes components for app flow, retrieval logic, configuration management, and domain knowledge handling, making it a strong portfolio project for practical AI application development.
metrics: Domain-Specific Query Handling, Context-Aware Responses, Persistent Vector Retrieval
features: Built an agriculture-focused chatbot using Retrieval-Augmented Generation for domain-specific question answering.
Uses structured JSON datasets as the core knowledge base for agronomy and farm-related information retrieval.
Implements semantic search with ChromaDB to store and retrieve contextually relevant vector embeddings.
Designed with a modular Python architecture including app logic, retrieval pipeline, and configuration components.

name: Silicon plate fault detection using machine learning
description: An end-to-end machine learning system for detecting faulty semiconductor wafer sensors using automated data ingestion, preprocessing, model training, and prediction workflows.
detailedDescription: This project is a complete machine learning pipeline built to identify faulty wafer sensor readings in semiconductor manufacturing data. It covers the full workflow from MongoDB-based data ingestion and artifact creation to data transformation, model training, evaluation, and prediction deployment. The system uses Scikit-learn and XGBoost for classification tasks and provides a Flask-based interface for uploading CSV files and generating prediction outputs, making it a practical end-to-end production-style ML project.
metrics: End-to-End ML Pipeline, Automated Training Workflow, CSV-Based Fault Prediction Interface
features: Built an end-to-end fault detection pipeline for semiconductor wafer sensor data.
Implemented data ingestion from MongoDB followed by preprocessing, transformation, and artifact generation.
Trained and evaluated machine learning classification models including XGBoost and Scikit-learn-based estimators.
Developed a Flask-based web interface for CSV upload and prediction file generation.

name: Real-Time Number Plate Detection
description: A real-time computer vision system that detects, highlights, and saves vehicle number plates from a live webcam feed using OpenCV and Haar Cascade Classifier.
detailedDescription: This project is a real-time license number plate detection system developed using Python and OpenCV. It captures live video through a webcam, processes frames for plate detection using a Haar Cascade classifier, and highlights detected number plates on screen. The system also supports saving the detected plate region as an image, making it a practical computer vision project that demonstrates image preprocessing, object detection, and real-time frame analysis.
metrics: Real-Time Plate Detection, Live Webcam Processing, Automatic Plate Region Saving
features: Built a real-time number plate detection system using OpenCV and Haar Cascade Classifier.
Processed live webcam frames to detect and highlight vehicle license plates.
Implemented image capture functionality to save detected number plate regions.
Applied grayscale preprocessing and area-based filtering to improve detection reliability.
